nebula-sender.are-you-sure-delete-draft: Are you sure that you want to delete this draft:
nebula-sender.are-you-sure-resend-messag: Are you sure that you want to resend this message:
nebula-sender.general-draft-error: We were not able to retrieve your requested draft.
nebula-sender.general-drafts-error: We were not able to retrieve your drafts.
nebula-sender.general-messages-error: We were not able to retrieve your messages.
nebula-sender.preview-draft-copy: To save this message to be sent at a later date, click "Save Draft." Otherwise click the button below to either send and/or preview the message.
nebula-sender.preview-update-draft-copy: Click "Update Draft" to save this draft again, or click the buttons below to either send and/or preview the message.
nebula-sender.select-compose-to-create-m: Select "Compose" to create a new message
nebula-sender.there-was-a-problem-resend: There was a problem resending your message.
tool.subject-copy: Enter the subject line for your message
tool.recipients-toggle-copy: Would you like to send this message to all of the users?
tool.recipients-manual-input-copy: Enter the users'/recipients' email addresses that you would like to send this message to.
tool.recipients-send-all: Message will be sent to all users.
tool.content-copy: Add the content for the message that you would like to send.
tool.select-content-file: Select the HTML file with the content that you would like to import.
tool.preview-copy: Click the button below to either send and/or preview the message.
tool.success-copy: Your email message has been sent successfully. If you would like to send another message, please click the button below to start over.
tool.toggle-use-file: Would you like to upload a static HTML file to populate this message's content?
tool.invalid-paste: It looks like addresses you pasted were not valid, or already exist.
tool.event-details: Enter the information of the event you want to create.
